시편 50:1.content: The Mighty One, God, Yahweh, speaks, and calls the earth from sunrise to sunset.

시편 50:2.content: Out of Zion, the perfection of beauty, God shines out.

시편 50:3.content: Our God comes, and does not keep silent. A fire devours before him. It is very stormy around him.

시편 50:4.content: He calls to the heavens above, to the earth, that he may judge his people:

시편 50:5.content: “Gather my saints together to me, those who have made a covenant with me by sacrifice.”

시편 50:6.content: The heavens shall declare his righteousness, for God himself is judge.

시편 50:7.content: “Hear, my people, and I will speak. Israel, I will testify against you. I am God, your God.

시편 50:8.content: I don’t rebuke you for your sacrifices. Your burnt offerings are continually before me.

시편 50:9.content: I have no need for a bull from your stall, nor male goats from your pens.

시편 50:10.content: For every animal of the forest is mine, and the livestock on a thousand hills.

시편 50:11.content: I know all the birds of the mountains. The wild animals of the field are mine.

시편 50:12.content: If I were hungry, I would not tell you, for the world is mine, and all that is in it.

시편 50:13.content: Will I eat the meat of bulls, or drink the blood of goats?

시편 50:14.content: Offer to God the sacrifice of thanksgiving. Pay your vows to the Most High.

시편 50:15.content: Call on me in the day of trouble. I will deliver you, and you will honor me.”

시편 50:16.content: But to the wicked God says, “What right do you have to declare my statutes, that you have taken my covenant on your lips,

시편 50:17.content: since you hate instruction, and throw my words behind you?

시편 50:18.content: When you saw a thief, you consented with him, and have participated with adulterers.

시편 50:19.content: “You give your mouth to evil. Your tongue frames deceit.

시편 50:20.content: You sit and speak against your brother. You slander your own mother’s son.

시편 50:21.content: You have done these things, and I kept silent. You thought that I was just like you. I will rebuke you, and accuse you in front of your eyes.

시편 50:22.content: “Now consider this, you who forget God, lest I tear you into pieces, and there be no one to deliver.

시편 50:23.content: Whoever offers the sacrifice of thanksgiving glorifies me, and prepares his way so that I will show God’s salvation to him.”
